summary: Lewis Hamilton's arrival injects fresh momentum into Ferrari's title assault as the Scuderia seeks to capitalize on his Spa masterclass and rebuild confidence against a resurgent McLaren. Watch how the midfield teams exploit Ferrari's setup vulnerabilities on Spa's high-speed corners—a technical proving ground that could expose strategic weaknesses or validate Hamilton's impact. A dominant Ferrari performance would signal a genuine championship resurgence, while anything less risks squandering Hamilton's confidence injection and handing McLaren crucial points in the constructors' battle.
